# Firecrawl

## When to use

- Project scrapes the web and wants markdown-clean output without running a browser locally.

## When NOT to use

- Project needs interactive browser automation — see `scraping-playwright.md`.
- Simple static pages only — see `scraping-requests-bs4.md`.
